60秒任务: 「举例」：定义/背景/例子/结论；A=听懂潜台词并稳住关系；B=误判立场/过度直接翻车。
目标功能: 定义｜结构化说明｜例证｜比较｜结论｜笔记抓取
场景族: 课堂｜研讨室｜讲座｜访谈｜白板说明
推荐掌握的高价值、高频、可复用句型、短语、习语、固定搭配 池:
For example, ___.（基础举例）
A good case is ___.（提出案例）
Let me give a concrete example.（引出具体例子）
This shows how ___ works in practice.（连接例子与概念）
It’s an example of ___, not ___.（区分例子类型）
The example supports the point that ___.（说明证据作用）
That case is useful because ___.（评价案例价值）
Can you give an everyday example?（请求生活例子）
The speaker uses this example to show ___.（识别演讲目的）
One detail in the example is ___.（抓取细节）
The pattern is easier to see in this case.（例子帮助识别模式）
This example is interesting, but not typical.（评价代表性）
We should be careful not to overgeneralize.（避免过度概括）
A similar example would be ___.（迁移例子）
The contrast example makes the difference clearer.（对比例子）
So the example connects back to ___.（回扣主题）
推荐掌握的核心词汇、词组池:
Nouns: example, case, detail, pattern, evidence, point
Verbs: illustrate, support, show, compare, contrast, overgeneralize
Adjectives: concrete, typical, unusual, relevant, everyday, similar
Connectors: for example, for instance, in practice, in contrast, similarly
Chunks: concrete example, everyday example, supports the point, works in practice, not typical, connect back to
